name: Butter Beans with Ham Bone and Okra
recipeIngredient: or 2 16-oz cans of butter beans -- drained
1/2 pound okra, washed and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ham bone and water in a large saucepan. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to simmer and cook, covered, for 45 minutes. Remove the ham bone from the saucepan. Remove the meat from the bone, finely shred it, and return both meat and bone to the pan.
2. Add the butter beans (fresh or drained canned) to the saucepan. Bring to a simmer, then stir in the remaining ingredients. Simmer until the beans and okra are tender, about 25 minutes (or less for canned beans). Discard the ham bone. Serve hot.
